creator: yusisamerican@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #2)

Ah Im not a maintainer, nor is this my port, I just was subscribed to the x11 mailing list a long time ago and have a habit of reading all of my emails :o I dont have any say in how things go in FreeBSD ports and your free to modify the LICENSE as you see fit.
